presentation.chiefComplaint: Ran out of my blood pressure medication and need a refill

history.hpi: Ran out of her routine antihypertensive three days ago while traveling and would like a bridging prescription. Feels completely well, no headache, chest pain, shortness of breath, or visual changes.
redFlags: Confirm no hypertensive emergency symptoms (chest pain, neuro deficit, visual change)

expert.esiRationale: Well-appearing patient with normal vitals seeking a medication refill, no acute complaint. No resources anticipated beyond a prescription (history and exam only). No resources -> ESI 5.

provenance.sourceRef: ED Triage Trainer hand-authored seed case
